what_it_does: This file is a minimal channel attachment record that registers an image asset in the design-assets channel, linking an attachment id to a target image URI and recording when it was added.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no body content
It has an id att-7b72a9a4, channel design-assets, attachment_type images, and an added timestamp of 2026-06-22T12:26:24.832366+00:00
The target field points to image://design-assets/icons/image (15)
No code symbols, descriptions, titles, or checksums are present
standouts: The target URI contains a space and a parenthetical number: image://design-assets/icons/image (15)
The record is extremely sparse, with only type and temporal metadata
It belongs to the design-assets channel and references an image
concerns: The target URI includes a literal space and parentheses, which may cause parsing or resolution issues
There is no title, description, MIME type, size, or checksum to identify or validate the referenced image
The meaning of '(15)' in the target is unexplained
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a stable att-* id
Records an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone
References an external asset via a URI-like target field
Follows a minimal, schema-light record style
notes: A bare attachment ledger entry that points to a design-assets image but carries almost no identifying metadata.
questions: What does the '(15)' suffix in the target URI represent?
Is image://design-assets/icons/image (15) resolvable by the system?
Why is there no title, description, or file size for this attachment?
Is attachment_type an enumerated value, and where is it defined?
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register an image attachment so it can be looked up later by id within the design-assets channel.
novelty: The target URI embeds a space and a parenthetical number, which is unusual for a clean asset identifier.
contribution: It contributes a dated, typed pointer from an attachment id to a specific image asset in the design-assets channel, supporting retrieval and cross-referencing without embedding the asset itself.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata record att-7b72a9a4 in the design-assets channel references an image target image://design-assets/icons/image (15) and records an added timestamp of 2026-06-22.
intention_for_embedding: This file was intended to catalog and point to an image asset within the design-assets channel.
